name: Chili Mayonnaise
recipeIngredient: White wine vinegar to thin (if needed)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the mayonnaise and Dijon mustard.
2. Add the chopped celery, red pepper, and scallion.
3. Stir in the toasted chili powder and minced garlic.
4. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper.
5. If desired, thin the mixture with white wine vinegar.
Yield: 1 cup
